_info: Manually curated articles for the Morning Brief. The 'reason' field on each entry records the editorial decision — this is institutional memory: coverage gaps, competitive intelligence, classification edge cases, or important context that auto-fetching missed. brief.py merges these into the story feed on every run. Any Claude session revisiting this project should read this file to understand past coverage decisions and patterns.

articles.headline: MIFL records Rs.818mn PBT in FY 2025-26, up 193% YoY
articles.snippet: Mahindra Ideal Finance Ltd (MIFL) posted its strongest ever financial performance in FY 2025-26: PBT Rs.818mn (+193% YoY), PAT Rs.478mn (+228% YoY), disbursements Rs.57.6bn (+98% YoY). Loan book grew 82% YoY to Rs.26.95bn. Cost-to-income ratio improved to 50.5% from 68.9%. Gross stage 3 ratio declined to 1.73%.
articles.reason: MIFL's strongest-ever annual results (FY 2025-26) — the anchor story for this client. Auto-fetch missed it because Daily Mirror blocks Google News indexing for this article and the CORS policy blocks the studio auto-fill. Key metrics: PBT +193%, PAT +228%, disbursements +98% YoY, loan book Rs.26.95bn. Use as baseline whenever MIFL coverage looks thin — these numbers set the competitive context for the NBFI sector.
